      Leading data engineering initiatives for international clients, architecting cloud-native solutions, 
      and integrating AI capabilities into enterprise applications.

title: Data Engineering Portfolio
text:
🚀 Data Engineering Projects
  
    Real-world implementations of scalable data infrastructure, AI integration, and cloud-native solutions
  


Featured Projects


🏗️ Enterprise Data Lake - TeamStation AI


  Medallion Architecture Data Lake
  
    AWS Glue
    Step Functions
    Lambda
    DMS
    Python
  
  
  Challenge: Build enterprise data lake from ground up for international clients with real-time streaming and batch processing capabilities.
  
  Solution:
  
    • Implemented medallion architecture (Bronze/Silver/Gold layers)
    • Custom Python packages for data transformation
    • Step Functions orchestration for complex workflows
    • DMS streaming for real-time data ingestion
    • S3-based data lake with partitioning strategy
  
  
  
    
      3
      Data Layers
    
    
      50+
      Data Sources
    
    
      TB
      Data Processed
    
    
      99.9%
      Uptime
    
  
  
  Impact: Enabled real-time analytics for business intelligence, reduced data processing time by 70%, and established foundation for AI/ML initiatives.



🤖 AI-Powered BI Integration


  Natural Language BI Querying
  
    LLM Integration
    BI Tools
    Snowflake Schema
    Python
    AWS
  
  
  Challenge: Enable non-technical users to query complex data warehouse using natural language.
  
  Solution:
  
    • Integrated third-party BI tool with AI capabilities
    • Implemented authentication flow to frontend application
    • Built Snowflake schema with ad-hoc query flexibility
    • Automated visualization generation based on query intent
    • Created automation procedures for common BI operations
  
  
  
    
      10x
      Faster Insights
    
    
      80%
      Less SQL Needed
    
    
      100+
      Automated Reports
    
  
  
  Impact: Democratized data access across organization, reduced time-to-insight from days to minutes, enabled self-service analytics.



🔄 CI/CD Pipeline Automation


  Infrastructure as Code & Deployment Automation
  
    GitHub Actions
    Terraform
    Docker
    AWS
  
  
  Challenge: Automate deployment of data infrastructure and ETL pipelines with zero downtime.
  
  Solution:
  
    • GitHub Actions workflows for automated testing and deployment
    • Terraform modules for infrastructure provisioning
    • Docker containerization for consistent environments
    • Automated rollback mechanisms
    • Infrastructure testing and validation
  
  
  
    
      95%
      Deployment Success
    
    
      5 min
      Deploy Time
    
    
      0
      Downtime
    
  
  
  Impact: Reduced deployment time from hours to minutes, eliminated manual errors, enabled rapid iteration and feature delivery.



📚 AI-Enhanced Documentation System


  Unified Documentation with Quarto
  
    Quarto
    GitHub
    AI
    Markdown
  
  
  Challenge: Create unified documentation system for complex data infrastructure that stays up-to-date.
  
  Solution:
  
    • Quarto-based documentation leveraging GitHub repositories
    • AI enhancement for automatic documentation updates
    • Covers Step Functions, Lambdas, custom packages
    • Searchable knowledge base
    • Automated deployment with GitHub Actions
  
  
  
    
      90%
      Faster Onboarding
    
    
      500+
      Doc Pages
    
    
      Auto
      Updates
    
  
  
  Impact: Reduced new team member onboarding from weeks to days, improved knowledge sharing, decreased support tickets.


Technical Architecture


  Core Technology Stack
  
  
    
      ☁️ Cloud Platform
      
        • AWS (Primary)
        • Multi-region deployment
        • Serverless architecture
      
    
    
    
      🔧 Data Processing
      
        • AWS Glue
        • Step Functions
        • Lambda
        • DMS
      
    
    
    
      💾 Storage & DB
      
        • S3 Data Lake
        • PostgreSQL
        • Snowflake Schema
      
    
    
    
      🚀 DevOps
      
        • GitHub Actions
        • Terraform
        • Docker
        • Infrastructure as Code
      
    
  


GitHub Activity


  
    
  
  
    
  



  Want to discuss a project?
  
    📧 danielamieva@dar4datascience.com
